red_herring.value: Popular assumption that supernatural/divine forces are the primary conflict, when the real struggle is institutional power between Rome and reformers
red_herring.quote: Everything seemed to indicate that the Reformer's work was about to close. But Luther was fearless still.

clue_fairness.value: Historical prophecies and their fulfillment are presented as evidence available to all readers through biblical text
clue_fairness.quote: The suppression of the Scriptures during the period of papal supremacy was foretold by the prophets

social_world.value: Papal institutional hierarchy versus reformist movement - Rome's political and religious authority structure controlling truth through suppression
social_world.quote: Rome had hurled her anathemas against him, and the world looked on, nothing doubting that he would perish

reveal_mechanic.value: Historical pattern matching - demonstrating papal policy consequences through the French Revolution as fulfillment of prophetic warning
reveal_mechanic.quote: That terrible outbreaking was but the legitimate result of Rome's suppression of the Scriptures

media_and_audience.value: Public perception manipulated through institutional control of religious texts and burning of reformist writings
media_and_audience.quote: My enemies have been able, by burning my books, to injure the cause of truth in the minds of the common people
